title: papaver oliverianum
intro: Papaver oliverianum, also known as the Oliver's poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family (Papaveraceae). This perennial plant is native to the western United States and has been used for centuries in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Papaver oliverianum include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as insomnia and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Papaver oliverianum include dried flower heads, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
